title: WaveSpeed Expands Unified LLM API With Access to GPT, Claude, Gemini and 260+ Models
summary: WaveSpeed Expands Unified LLM API With Access to GPT, Claude, Gemini and 260+ Models Published: 2026-05-17T10:01:00-04:00 Type: Press Release Summary WaveSpeed has expanded its unified LLM API to allow developers to access more than 260 language models, including GPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, D
content: WaveSpeed has expanded its unified LLM API to allow developers to access more than 260 language models, including GPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen and Mistral. The new API allows developers to compare, switch and deploy leading LLMs while connecting language workflows with image, video, audio and 3D generation. Unlike LLM-only gateways, WaveSpeed connects language models with a broader catalog of over 1,000 total AI models. The API uses a standard chat-completions interface and includes support for chat completions, streaming, JSON mode, tool use and vision. Pricing is transparent and per-token, with separate input and output rates listed for each model.

title: Anthropic's Code With Claude Announces Managed Agents, Proactive Workflows, Capability Curve
summary: Anthropic's Code With Claude Announces Managed Agents, Proactive Workflows, Capability Curve - InfoQ Published: 2026-05-18T13:14:00+00:00 Summary Anthropic hosted Code with Claude 2026 in San Francisco on May 6, covering shipping work across Claude Code, the Claude Developer Platform, and pa
content: Anthropic hosted Code with Claude 2026 in San Francisco on May 6, covering shipping work across Claude Code, the Claude Developer Platform, and partner deployments at GitHub, Vercel, Datadog, Bun, and several AI-native startups. The event highlighted the consequences of model step-changes for product architecture, organizational design, and infrastructure economics. Dickson Tsai of Anthropic's Claude Code team demonstrated updates to Claude code, including remote control, split views, and a redesigned desktop GUI. GitHub's chief product officer Mario Rodriguez co-presented a cache hit rate, highlighting three causes of cache invalidation that GitHub has had to engineer around. Anthropic co-founder and CEO Dario Amodei reported that first-quarter 2026 revenue and usage, on an annualized basis, grew 80x rather than the 10x Anthropic had planned for.

title: Dell Technologies to Bring Grok SpaceXAI Models On-Premises to Enterprise Environments
summary: Dell Technologies to Bring Grok SpaceXAI Models On-Premises to Enterprise Environments | Dell Key takeaways: Dell Technologies and SpaceXAI are revolutionizing enterprise AI by enabling on-premises deployment of Grok models through the Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA. This collaboration provides busine
content: Dell Technologies to Bring Grok SpaceXAI Models On-Premises to Enterprise Environments | Dell [...] Key takeaways: Dell Technologies and SpaceXAI are revolutionizing enterprise AI by enabling on-premises deployment of Grok models through the Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA. This collaboration provides businesses with advanced AI reasoning capabilities while maintaining complete data sovereignty and security control. Organizations can now integrate powerful AI directly into their existing infrastructure and workflows, transforming AI from experimental technology into production-ready enterprise systems. [...] Dell Technologies is redefining enterprise AI by bringing the latest SpaceXAI models to the Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA, unlocking the on-prem deployment of SpaceXAI’s frontier model directly where data, systems and workflows already live. [...] As adoption accelerates, enterprises are increasingly looking for ways [...] deploy AI systems in secure, governed environments to maintain control over their information, reduce costs and improve performance. Together with SpaceXAI and NVIDIA, [...] SpaceXAI will deliver advanced reasoning and multimodal capabilities as secure, enterprise-grade AI endpoints, deployable fully on-premises with Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA. [...] Through this collaboration, SpaceXAI’s models will integrate with Dell’s AI infrastructure portfolio, including the Dell AI Data Platform and Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA. These platforms are already widely used by enterprises to store, manage and govern data, as well as to deploy and scale AI workloads within controlled environments. This will allow enterprises to connect to their existing data sources and get insights without having to move their data or consume cloud models by token. NVIDIA Confidential Computing with NVIDIA Blackwell secures and protects the latest SpaceXAI models while also encrypting and protecting enterprise data, ensuring it can’t be viewed or altered by unauthorized parties, including the infrastructure operators. [...] Dell and SpaceXAI are also enabling these models to run seamlessly within enterprise AI pipelines powered by Dell AI Factory with NVIDIA. This includes enabling organizations to prepare and govern data, deploy models, orchestrate workflows and integrate AI-driven insights directly into their existing applications and systems within hybrid or on-premises environments. [...] With SpaceXAI models integrated into Dell environments, businesses can analyze, automate, and act on their data with greater precision, transforming AI from isolated experimentation into repeatable, production-ready systems.

title: DeepMind employee signals Gemini 3.5 ahead of Google I/O 2026 launch
summary: DeepMind employee signals Gemini 3.5 ahead of Google I/O 2026 launch - Startup Fortune Published: 2026-05-19T14:48:03+05:30 Summary Google's upcoming I/O 2026, which includes the launch of Gemini 3.5, is still a Gemini story, but the public evidence does not support this.
content: Google's upcoming I/O 2026, which includes the launch of Gemini 3.5, is still a Gemini story, but the public evidence does not support this. Google has not publicly confirmed a Gemini release, a DeepMind employee confirmation, or a new model tier. This distinction matters as model names move markets, product roadmaps, and developer expectations almost as fast as the models themselves. The more grounded story is that Google wants Gemini to feel less like a separate chatbot and more like infrastructure running through its products. A model update can change where users meet the technology and how businesses build around it. However, it is uncertain whether an incremental Gemini update or a larger Gemini 4-style reveal will be announced. If Google presents a credible model with broad product integration, OpenAI, Meta, and AI labs will be under pressure to explain their own roadmaps.

title: Anthropic Launches Claude for Small Business With Direct SMB Productivity Implications
summary: Anthropic Launches Claude for Small Business With Direct SMB Productivity Implications - Business2Community Published: 2026-05-18T19:52:14+00:00 Author: Craig Corbeels Summary Anthropic has launched Claude for Small Business, a packaged product that installs AI directly into tools small oper
content: Anthropic has launched Claude for Small Business, a packaged product that installs AI directly into tools small operators already run. The product ships with 15 ready-to-run agentic workflows designed to automate tasks such as payroll planning, monthly financial close, invoice follow-up, and marketing campaign execution. The launch positions Anthropic explicitly in the SMB segment, entering a market where companies like OpenAI, Google, and Microsoft have been embedding AI into business software stack. Claude Cowork, the platform for users to connect their existing tools and select workflows, operates through a toggle install. The company also teaches a course developed with PayPal that teaches small business owners how to use AI effectively and safely. Pricing for Claude for SMB has not yet been disclosed.

title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
summary: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT | OpenAI Published: 2026-05-16T11:41:15+00:00 Summary The company is releasing a preview of a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT to Pro users in the US, allowing users to securely connect their financial accounts and ask questions grounded
content: The company is releasing a preview of a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT to Pro users in the US, allowing users to securely connect their financial accounts and ask questions grounded in their financial context. This comes as part of a larger effort to improve the experience and expand the service further. The ability to connect financial accounts with their real financial context and share important context about your financial life can help identify patterns, understand tradeoffs, and plan for big decisions in a way that feels more personal and complete. The company is working with trusted ecosystem partners like Intuit to develop an internal benchmark to evaluate response quality and grade the service's performance on challenging personal finance tasks.
